title: Stay of proceeding; extension
doc_html:
Art. 440.  Stay of proceeding; extension

Upon issuing a referral for mediation, the court may stay the proceeding and order a review of the mediation within sixty days of the referral.  The court may extend such period for an additional thirty days.

Acts 1999, No. 894, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 440.  Stay of proceeding; extension
Upon issuing a referral for mediation, the court may stay the proceeding and order a review of the mediation within sixty days of the referral.  The court may extend such period for an additional thirty days.
Acts 1999, No. 894, §1.
